title: Norwegian Stew with Applesauce
description: A hearty and comforting stew made with Norwegian meat and a hint of sweetness from applesauce.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add onion, carrot, and potato; cook until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
Add beef broth, applesauce, and fermented red cabbage; stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
